chunks.en: Today I want to talk about restarting my computer.
chunks.ja: 今日はパソコンの再起動について話したいと思います。

chunks.en: When my computer gets slow, I restart it.
chunks.ja: パソコンの動きが遅くなったとき、私は再起動します。

chunks.en: First, I close all my apps.
chunks.ja: まず、私はすべてのアプリを閉じます。

chunks.en: Then I click the restart button.
chunks.ja: それから再起動ボタンをクリックします。

chunks.en: After that, I wait for it to start again.
chunks.ja: そのあと、立ち上がるまで待ちます。

chunks.en: It often fixes small problems for me.
chunks.ja: これで小さな問題はよく直ります。

chunks.en: Sometimes the internet works better after this.
chunks.ja: ときどき、このあとインターネットの調子が良くなります。

chunks.en: So restarting is an easy and useful trick.
chunks.ja: だから再起動は簡単で役に立つ方法です。

outline: Point 1: close apps when it's slow
Point 2: wait and it fixes small problems

modelTalk.text: Sometimes my computer gets really slow. It doesn't open my files fast. So I decide to restart it. First, I close all my apps. I save my work before I close them. That's important, so I don't lose it. Then I click restart and I wait. My computer turns off and starts again. It takes a minute or two. I just wait and stay calm. When it's ready, I open my apps again. Often the computer works fine now. Restarting fixes small problems a lot. It's easy, and I don't need help. I try this first every time. It usually works for me.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about restarting my computer.
chunks.ja: 今日はパソコンの再起動について話したいです。

chunks.en: When my computer gets slow, I restart it.
chunks.ja: パソコンの動きが遅くなったとき、私は再起動します。

chunks.en: First, I close all my apps before I stop it.
chunks.ja: まず、止める前にすべてのアプリを閉じます。

chunks.en: Then I click the restart button and wait.
chunks.ja: それから再起動ボタンを押して待ちます。

chunks.en: I wait for it to start again, about one minute.
chunks.ja: 立ち上がるまで、だいたい1分ほど待ちます。

chunks.en: It often fixes small problems like a frozen screen.
chunks.ja: 画面が固まるような小さな問題は、これでよく直ります。

chunks.en: So restarting is an easy first step for me.
chunks.ja: だから再起動は、私にとって簡単な最初の一歩です。

outline: Point 1: I restart when it's slow and close apps first
Point 2: I wait, and it fixes small problems

modelTalk.text: Sometimes my computer gets slow. It doesn't open pages fast. So I stop and restart it. But first I close all my apps. I don't want to lose my work. So I save my files first. Then I click restart. I wait for it to start again. It takes a minute or two. I don't touch anything. I just wait. When it comes back, it feels faster. It often fixes small problems for me. The screen doesn't freeze so much. I like this trick a lot. It's easy and quick. I do it once a week. It really helps my computer work well.
